---
title: "Nachi Lieder"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: null
    css: style.css
    toc: false
    highlight: tango
---

<center>
  <img src="headshots/headshot.jpeg" style="width:180px; border-radius: 50%;" />
</center>


<div class="header">
  <h1>Nachi Lieder</h1>
  <p class="subtitle">Data Science & AI Systems Lead • Revenue Intelligence • LLM Pipelines & Decision Systems</p>
</div>

I’m a Data Science & AI Systems Lead with 11+ years of experience building production-grade machine learning and LLM-powered systems that drive executive decision-making. I lead design of revenue forecasting, cohort-based LTV modeling, marketing optimization, and KPI intelligence frameworks that influence C-level strategy — with deep expertise in time-series forecasting, long-horizon LTV prediction, survival analysis, causal inference, vector embeddings, and LLM pipelines.

I thrive at the intersection of technical depth and cross-functional leadership: partnering with C-level on revenue and planning, defining modeling standards and mentoring data scientists, and taking systems from concept to production. I'm committed to clarity, measurable outcomes, and bridging complexity with action.

Beyond core ML and AI systems, I've developed and published work in sports analytics (MMM and fatigue analysis for basketball lineups) and built quantitative side projects in bias detection and arbitrage portfolio management. I bring curiosity, discipline, and a focus on delivering results.


<div class="section">
  <h2>📄 Resume</h2>
  <a class="cv-link" href="cv.html" target="_blank">View My CV</a>
</div>


<div class="section">
  <h2>📚 Published Papers</h2>
  <div class="link-grid">
  <a class="cv-link" href="Basketball_Squad_Productivity.pdf" target="_blank">From Marketing to the Court: Applying MMM and Fatigue Analysis for Optimal Basketball Lineups (2025)</a>
  
  <a class="cv-link" href="Enhancing_Forecasting_with_a_2D_Time_Series_Approach_for_Cohort_Based_Data.pdf" target="_blank">Enhancing Forecasting with a 2D Time Series Approach for Cohort-Based Data (2025)</a>

  </div>
</div>


<div class="section">
  <h2>Blog Posts</h2>
  <a class="cv-link" href="https://medium.com/lightricks-tech-blog/unleashing-the-power-predictive-modeling-overcoming-challenges-in-forecasting-annual-revenue-7928ebbbedce" target="_blank">Unleashing the Power of Predictive Modeling: Overcoming Challenges in Forecasting Annual Revenue</a>
  
  <a class="cv-link" href="https://medium.com/@nachilieder/fifa-world-cup-game-prediction-team-similarity-method-feb4828feaec" target="_blank">FIFA World Cup Game Prediction — Team Similarity Method</a>
  
  <a class="cv-link" href="https://medium.com/lightricks-tech-blog/evaluation-monitoring-why-38a132481eb5" target="_blank">ML Models: Evaluation & Monitoring, Why?</a>
  
  <a class="cv-link" href="https://medium.com/sports-analytics-and-data-science/fantasy-premier-league-lineup-optimization-using-mixed-linear-programming-the-knapsack-problem-3c19b3b007a2" target="_blank">Fantasy Premier League — Lineup Optimization Using Mixed Linear Programming (A.K.A “The Knapsack Problem”)</a>
</div>
